pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which copies the data to this path.
export_result.sh expects the screenshot at this path (or optionally in Recordings).
verifier.py uses a VLM prompt to confirm the vertical scale is set to '1000 uV' or larger.
verifier.py requires both Notch and Bandpass filters to be disabled ('None', 'Off', or disabled).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real EEG data from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (Subject 1, Run 1, eyes open baseline), converted to an OpenBCI-compatible CSV format. The data is placed at /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt. To successfully display the raw signal, the OpenBCI GUI Time Series vertical scale must be set to 1000 uV (or 1 mV), and both the Notch and Bandpass filters must be set to 'None'. The final screenshot is expected at /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/raw_signal_view.png (though export_result.sh also accepts the Recordings directory).
